subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O Lord of Names and Creator of earth and heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy most great signs and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله الاسماء و فاطر الارض و السماء اسئلک بایاتک الکبری و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for protection, @consultation
